body: Bill, thanks for the thoughtful note — really appreciated your framing around the current market dynamics for early-stage climate deals. I've been sitting with your point about valuation discipline, and I think you're right that we need to hold the line even when founders push back with comparable rounds from 2021. On the [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) side, we're seeing a handful of genuinely compelling Series A opportunities in grid infrastructure and industrial heat decarbonization, so I'd love to get your read on a couple of them when you have bandwidth. There's one company in particular I've been tracking closely that I think would be right up your alley — happy to share the deck under NDA if you're open to it. As always, I value your perspective more than most, and a quick call this week or next would be great if your schedule allows.
